# Gorget

## Overview

At the start of each combat, gain 4 Plating.

## Live Text

- **Gorget**: At the start of each combat, gain 4 Plating.
- **Plating**: At the end of your turn, gain Block. Plating is reduced by 1 at the start of your turn.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong with Parrying Shield because start-of-combat Plating can help reach the 10 Block end-turn threshold without spending as many Defends.
- Against sleeping Lagavulin Matriarch, Gorget gives free setup Block while Stone Armor and other non-damaging cards are played.
